title.en: 'Total calamity!' US gift Belgium a third goal
title.zh-CN: “彻底灾难！”美国赠送比利时第三个进球

summary.en: USA goalkeeper Matt Freese with a huge error in judgement as he gifts Belgium's Hans Vanaken the ball, leaving him with an easy finish that defender Tim Ream could've done more to stop. Errors all...
summary.zh-CN: 美国守门员马特·弗里斯（ Matt Freese ）在判断上犯了一个巨大的错误，因为他给了比利时的汉斯·瓦纳肯（ Hans Vanaken ）球，让他轻松完成，后卫蒂姆·雷姆（ Tim Ream ）本可以做更多的事情来阻止。错误全部...

title.en: Balogun reprieve ends in anti-climax as US dumped out by Belgium
title.zh-CN: 随着美国被比利时抛弃，巴洛根缓刑以反高潮结束

summary.en: Folarin Balogun's red card reprieve appeared to hinder rather than help his country as an out-of-sorts USA side were thrashed 4-1 by Belgium to end the co-hosts' World Cup dreams.
summary.zh-CN: Folarin Balogun的红牌缓刑似乎阻碍而不是帮助他的国家，因为美国队以4比1的比分被比利时击败，以结束共同主办方世界杯的梦想。

title.en: Ragged USA crash out of World Cup with last-16 defeat to Belgium
title.zh-CN: 美国队在世界杯赛场失利，最后16场比赛输给比利时

summary.en: The United States are out of the World Cup as Belgium eliminated the co-hosts in the last 16 at Seattle Stadium on Monday night.The US were looking to reach the World Cup quarter-finals for the first...
summary.zh-CN: 周一晚上，由于比利时在西雅图体育场的最后16场比赛中淘汰了联合主办方，美国退出了世界杯。美国希望进入世界杯四分之一决赛的第一场比赛......

title.en: ‘They have Messi, but we have Salah’: Egypt prepare to take on Argentina
title.zh-CN: “他们有梅西，但我们有萨拉赫” ：埃及准备迎战阿根廷

summary.en: Last 16 tie will be the first international meeting between two modern legends who may yet go on making historyAs Mohamed Salah savoured the feeling of Egypt’s historic victory over Australia, the...
summary.zh-CN: 最后16个领带将是两个现代传奇人物之间的第一次国际会议，他们可能会继续创造历史，因为穆罕默德·萨拉赫（ Mohamed Salah ）品尝了埃及对澳大利亚历史性胜利的感觉。

title.en: Ronaldo's World Cup career ends in tears as 'pandering' Martinez departs
title.zh-CN: 当“迎合”马丁内斯离开时，罗纳尔多的世界杯生涯以泪水告终

summary.en: BBC Sport looks at the end of Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup career as he fails to win football's biggest prize.
summary.zh-CN: BBC Sport关注克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多（ Cristiano Ronaldo ）世界杯生涯的结束，因为他未能赢得足球最大的奖项。

title.en: Spain's World Cup challenge built on record-breaking historic defence
title.zh-CN: 西班牙的世界杯挑战建立在破纪录的历史防守之上

summary.en: If Spain are to get their hands on the World Cup trophy again, they may have their defence, rather than their attack, to thank.
summary.zh-CN: 如果西班牙再次获得世界杯奖杯，他们可能会感谢他们的防守，而不是他们的进攻。

title.en: FA considering appeal after Quansah red card
title.zh-CN: 英足总考虑在Quansah红牌后提出上诉

summary.en: The Football Association is considering whether to appeal after England defender Jarell Quansah's red card against Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 在英格兰后卫贾雷尔·昆萨（ Jarell Quansah ）对墨西哥的红牌之后，足球协会正在考虑是否上诉。

title.en: Starmer intervened in row over Mexico-England kick-off time
title.zh-CN: Starmer在墨西哥-英格兰开球时间进行了排队干预

summary.en: Fifa had been set to bring the match forward by six hours, due to a forecast of thunderstorms.
summary.zh-CN: 由于雷暴的预测，国际足联原定将比赛提前六个小时。

title.en: Super-sub Merino delivers 'killer goal' for Spain
title.zh-CN: SUPER-SUB MERINO为西班牙带来“杀手级目标”

summary.en: Spain midfielder Mikel Merino coolly scores in added time to break Portuguese hearts, sending his side through to the quarter-finals of the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 西班牙中场球员米克尔·梅里诺（ Mikel Merino ）在额外的时间内冷静地得分，打破了葡萄牙人的心，将他的球队送入了2026年世界杯的四分之一决赛。

title.en: England win epic tie against Mexico to reach quarter-finals
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队赢得与墨西哥队的史诗并列，进入四分之一决赛

summary.en: Jude Bellingham scores twice and Harry Kane converts a penalty as 10-man England beat Mexico 3-2 in the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝林汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）得分两次，哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）在世界杯上以10人英格兰队3-2击败墨西哥队

title.en: An incredible night when England heroes were made
title.zh-CN: 英格兰英雄诞生的美妙夜晚

summary.en: On a spine-tingling night of drama, emotion and pure theatre in one of sport's most atmospheric arenas, England delivered one of their greatest performances.
summary.zh-CN: 在一个充满戏剧、情感和纯粹戏剧的激动人心的夜晚，在体育界最具氛围的舞台上，英格兰表演了他们最伟大的表演之一。

title.en: Henderson expected to have surgery on injured wrist
title.zh-CN: 亨德森预计将对受伤的手腕进行手术

summary.en: Jordan Henderson is expected to have surgery on the wrist injury he sustained while celebrating England's win over Mexico on Monday.
summary.zh-CN: 乔丹·亨德森（ Jordan Henderson ）预计将在周一庆祝英格兰队战胜墨西哥队时接受手腕损伤手术。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 29
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星29号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: Coach told FA Maddy Cusack was a liar, inquest hears
title.zh-CN: 教练告诉FA Maddy Cusack是个骗子，调查听到

summary.en: Jonathan Morgan says she left out detail about their relationship when speaking to her family.
summary.zh-CN: 乔纳森·摩根（ Jonathan Morgan ）说，在与家人交谈时，她忽略了有关他们关系的

title.en: Neymar says Brazil career over after Norway defeat
title.zh-CN: 内马尔表示，在挪威失利后，巴西的职业生涯结束了

summary.en: An emotional Neymar says his international career for Brazil is "over" following his side's exit at the 2026 World Cup at the hands of Norway.
summary.zh-CN: 情绪激动的内马尔表示，在他的球队在挪威手中退出2026年世界杯之后，他在巴西的国际生涯已经“结束”。

title.en: 'Iconic match at iconic stadium' - England win down to 'pure will'

summary.en: England are praised for showing "heart and belief" as they beat Mexico in an "iconic match at an iconic stadium" to reach the World Cup quarter-finals.

summary.en: The decision to effectively overturn the red card shown to United States forward Folarin Balogun leaves many unanswered questions.

summary.en: Cristiano Ronaldo has confirmed he has played in his last World Cup game - but says he won't make any "rash decisions" on whether he has played his final game for Portugal.

summary.en: There aren't enough superlatives to describe what Jude Bellingham produced in the cauldron that was the Azteca.

summary.en: England midfielder Jordan Henderson has been ruled out for the remainder of the World Cup.
